span.p:
api.ts → @paket/api-client
getApiClient() — fresh client per call, current session token

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LoginScreen
nur Mitarbeiternummer (kein PIN) → POST /api/auth/login

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
auth.ts · session.ts
login()/logout() · JWT claims · onSessionCleared()

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BundleHomeScreen
/ — Ware holen inline (je Beleg Kopf-Infos + Barcode-Pop-up) + Bearbeiten (frei wählbar, Problemfälle ganz unten) + Rest parken; Problemfall rot geparkt / grün geklärt

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
useMeToday() · useNextBundle() · useParkRemaining()
GET/POST /api/me/* — queryKey ['me','today']

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Code128Barcode (components/)
WE-Nr als Code-128-SVG im Pop-up (Dialog) — encoder: domain/code128.ts (pure)

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BelegProcessScreen
/case/:id — sticky Positions-Tabelle; Kopfzelle stapelt HS/Shop/CatMan/Etage/Filiale/Shopbereich; Etikettpreis (keine Order, kein Boxzettel)

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
useCaseFlow()
togglePositionChecked · setSkuQuantity · setCorrectedVkPrice · addProblem/removeProblem · complete · partialComplete

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ProblemDialog
Problem je Position/Größe (Katalog-Grund, lokal gesammelt)

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TeilabschlussDialog
Zusammenfassung aller Probleme → an Teamleitung

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
useProblemReasons()
GET /api/problem-reasons — dynamischer Problemarten-Katalog

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
workflowModel.ts
guards: canCompleteCase (Problem sperrt) · hasAnyProblem · skuQuantitiesBody · problemsBody

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
useCaseAggregate()
GET /api/me/cases/:id/aggregate — queryKey ['me','case',id,'aggregate']

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
persist.ts
persistStartPreparation/Complete/PartialComplete — plain POST, throws on failure

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
caseAggregateMapper.ts
CaseAggregateDto → CaseAggregate (domain/types.ts)

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

useFocusRefresh.ts
invalidateQueries(['me','today']) on window focus

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
useLiveUpdates.ts
EventSource /api/me/stream?token= — on message: invalidateQueries(['me','today'])

backend-api
